what_it_does: This file is a channel attachment metadata record that declares an attachment (att-c411bb7e) in the dragnet-development channel, of type board_items, targeting the board item board://item-0d8c3efd, with an added timestamp.
observations: YAML frontmatter only; no body content
Target is a board:// URI pointing to item-0d8c3efd
standouts: File contains only metadata, no payload or explanatory text
conventions: Uses YAML frontmatter with id, channel, attachment_type, target, and added fields
File name att-{id}.md in the channel_attachments directory
concerns: No payload or description of what the attachment represents
Target board item cannot be resolved from this file alone
No author or reason for the attachment is recorded
notes: A bare metadata stub linking a dragnet-development channel attachment to a board item URI, useful only as a cross-reference unless paired with the target board item.
questions: What content or decision does board://item-0d8c3efd contain?
Is the attachment type board_items meant to imply the board item is attached to the channel or vice versa?
purpose_vs_actual: Matches: the file acts as a metadata record for a channel attachment pointing to a board item, which is exactly what its fields describe.
intention_signals: It appears intended to create a durable, referenceable record that a specific attachment in the dragnet-development channel is associated with a particular board item.
novelty: The target field uses a board:// URI scheme to reference a board item, which is the only domain-specific structure in an otherwise generic metadata file.
contribution: It contributes a persistent cross-reference between a channel attachment identifier and a board item, preserving the attachment type and creation timestamp for later traversal or audit.
summary_for_embedding: A channel attachment metadata file for dragnet-development that links attachment att-c411bb7e (type board_items) to board item board://item-0d8c3efd with an added timestamp.
intention_for_embedding: This file was created to record that a board item is attached to the dragnet-development channel as a board_items attachment.
